apps.name: Dreams Finance
apps.subtitle: Personal finance + NY paycheck calculator
apps.localizedDescription: Personal finance tracker with a full New York State paycheck calculator (federal, NY state, NYC, FICA, SDI, PFL), recurring bill tracker, transaction log, and paycheck history with side-by-side comparison.
